description_long: This is a large commercial jet airliner with a distinctive black fuselage and gray underbelly, featuring a classic wide-body design. The aircraft has four turbofan engines mounted under its low, swept-back wings, which are equipped with slight dihedral angles and lack visible winglets. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer with a blue and white logo, and a conventional horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a multi-windowed, enclosed design. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear visible at the front. The airplane's overall appearance suggests a robust, long-range passenger or cargo transport, typical of major international airlines.
description: A large, black commercial jet airliner with four underwing engines, swept low wings, and a conventional tail. Features a forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black fuselage, four underwing engines, and the tail logo; nose gear is visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide fuselage, cockpit windows, and the full span of the swept wings with engines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the engines and tail design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, engine arrangement, and the dihedral angle of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows.
